home.title: BeSpaces
home.subtitle: Meeting rooms, coworking desks, and virtual offices — find the right workspace for your business.

room.availabilityDesc: Check the reserved blocks and request your ideal schedule. Availability syncs with the Agenda panel in the dashboard.

modal.title: How would you like to continue?
modal.subtitle: You can continue as a guest or sign in to use your saved details.

booking.pickDateTimeDesc: Select a date and click an available slot, or set the time manually.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.subtitle: We'll use this to confirm your booking and send access instructions.
contact.billingSubtitle: Required only if you need an invoice.

pricing.subscriptionNote: {{months}} months — first month charged now, then monthly

payment.slotUnavailable: This time slot is no longer available. Please go back and select a different time.
payment.slotUnavailableRefunded: This time slot was already booked. Your payment has been automatically refunded. Please go back and select a different time.
payment.paymentSuccessBookingFailed: Your payment was processed but the booking could not be created (the time slot may have been taken). Please contact us for a refund. Reference: {{ref}}
payment.freeBookingDesc: This is your free booking ({{used}} of {{limit}} this month).
payment.subscriptionActivated: Your subscription of {{amount}} has been activated. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly with access instructions.
payment.paymentProcessed: Your payment of {{amount}} has been processed successfully. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly with access instructions.
payment.serviceNotConfigured: Payment service URL is not configured
payment.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe publishable key is not configured
payment.notAvailable: Payment is not available right now.

hero.label: Virtual Office
hero.heading: Your company's registered place in the world.
hero.subheading: A legal address, a professional presence, and mail handling — without the overhead of a physical office.

benefits.heading: Everything a business address should offer.

items.title: Legal & Fiscal Address
items.body: A registered business address valid for tax authorities, banks, and registries.

items.title: Mail Scanning
items.body: Physical mail is received, scanned, and uploaded to your dashboard automatically.

items.title: Complete Privacy
items.body: Keep your personal address off public registries and official documents.

items.title: Registry Listing
items.body: Your company appears on Google Maps, business directories, and public registries.

items.title: 24/7 Access
items.body: Your digital mailbox is available around the clock, from any device.

items.title: Meeting Rooms
items.body: Use our professional meeting rooms when you need to meet clients in person.

form.heading: Register your office
form.subheading: Set up your virtual office in minutes.

confirmation.heading: You're registered!
confirmation.body: We'll be in touch shortly to activate your virtual office. Check your inbox for next steps.

register.title: Create your account

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions.

register.termsLabel: I have read and accept the <terms>terms and conditions</terms>.
register.success: Account created! Your 30-day free trial has started. Check your email to verify your account.

locationStep.heading: Choose your city
locationStep.subheading: Select the city where you want to register your company.

hero.label: Virtual Office
hero.title: Your professional address
hero.subtitle: Legal domicile, mail reception, workspace access and management platform — all included. No deposit, no commitment.

items.title: Legal & fiscal address
items.desc: Registered address valid for tax authorities, banks and business registries. Your company visible on Google Maps.

items.title: Mail reception
items.desc: We receive your mail and packages. Free scanning and instant email notification.

items.title: BeSpaces access
items.desc: Free coworking passes and meeting rooms across our network of physical spaces.

items.title: Platform included
items.desc: Management dashboard with contacts, billing, digital mailbox and AI assistant — all included in your plan.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: A plan for every stage of
pricing.vatNote: 30-day free trial. All prices + VAT. No commitment.
